@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

-PORTVERSION=	1.9.8.13056

 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.ringofsaturn.com/distfiles/
@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ IPV6_DESC=	IPv6 sockets support
 
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	EMVALID SPF SRS SEND FBACKW ZLIB CLAMAV DNSBL MATCHRE SENDERB MIMEMOD SSL IPV6
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/ASSP_1.98_13056_install/${PORTNAME:U}
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}/ASSP_1.99_13107_install/${PORTNAME:U}
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
